Project

Message Filter Tool

A productivity tool that helps users distinguish important messages from noisy streams through visual hierarchy and filtering rules.

Published Mar 10, 2026

KotlinAndroidSQLiteUI Architecture
GitHub Live Demo

This project focused on creating a calmer reading experience for busy message streams. The interface separated important and routine messages, while keeping the overall navigation simple and approachable.

Built with Astro. Adapt this template for your own portfolio or project showcase.
